es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.tool

Class ToolBox

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.tool.ToolBox

  • public class ToolBox
extends java.lang.Object
    Class with miscellaneous functionality.

    • Method Detail

      • getKeyStoreFromResource

        public static java.security.KeyStore getKeyStoreFromResource(int trustKeyStoreResource,
                                                             android.content.Context context)
                                                      throws java.security.NoSuchProviderException,
                                                             java.security.KeyStoreException,
                                                             java.security.cert.CertificateException,
                                                             java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException,
                                                             java.io.IOException
        Build KeyStore object from resource.
        Parameters:
        trustKeyStoreResource - identification of the resource to load.
        context - application context.
        Returns:
        KeyStore.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if context is null.
        java.security.NoSuchProviderException
        java.security.KeyStoreException
        java.security.cert.CertificateException
        java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException
        java.io.IOException

      • getKeyStoreFromResource

        public static java.security.KeyStore getKeyStoreFromResource(int trustKeyStoreResource,
                                                             java.lang.String keyStorePassword,
                                                             android.content.Context context)
                                                      throws java.security.NoSuchProviderException,
                                                             java.security.KeyStoreException,
                                                             java.security.cert.CertificateException,
                                                             java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException,
                                                             java.io.IOException
        Build KeyStore object from resource.
        Parameters:
        trustKeyStoreResource - identification of the resource to load.
        keyStorePassword - password that protects the keystore.
        context - application context.
        Returns:
        KeyStore instance.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if context is null.
        java.security.NoSuchProviderException
        java.security.KeyStoreException
        java.security.cert.CertificateException
        java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException
        java.io.IOException

      • getKeyStoreFromResource

        public static java.security.KeyStore getKeyStoreFromResource(int trustKeyStoreResource,
                                                             java.lang.String keyStorePassword,
                                                             java.lang.String keyStoreType,
                                                             java.lang.String provider,
                                                             android.content.Context context)
                                                      throws java.security.NoSuchProviderException,
                                                             java.security.KeyStoreException,
                                                             java.security.cert.CertificateException,
                                                             java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException,
                                                             java.io.IOException
        Build KeyStore object from resource.
        Parameters:
        trustKeyStoreResource - identification of the resource to load.
        keyStorePassword - password that protects the keystore.
        keyStoreType - type of the keystore to load ("JKS", "JCEKS", "BKS", "PKCS12", etc. More info at https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/technotes/guides/security/StandardNames.html#KeyStore).
        provider - provider use to load the keystore. Set null if default JCA Provider must be used.
        context - application context.
        Returns:
        KeyStore instance.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if context is null.
        java.security.NoSuchProviderException
        java.security.KeyStoreException
        java.security.cert.CertificateException
        java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException
        java.io.IOException

      • streamToString

        public static java.lang.String streamToString(java.io.InputStream inputStream)
                                       throws java.io.IOException
        Read the input stream and return a string encoded in 'UTF-8'.
        Parameters:
        inputStream - The stream to be read.
        Returns:
        The string built.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if inputStream is null.
        java.io.IOException

        public static java.lang.String streamToString(java.io.InputStream inputStream,
                                              java.nio.charset.Charset charset)

        Read the input stream and return a string.

        charset -
        Returns:
        The string built.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if inputStream or charset is null.

      • writePostDataToStream

        public static void writePostDataToStream(java.io.OutputStream outputStream,
                                         java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> params)
                                  throws java.io.IOException
        Write parameters in the output stream of the 'POST' request as 'UTF-8' URL encoded string.
        Parameters:
        outputStream - The stream to write in.
        params - The parameters to write.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if outputStream or params or charset is null.
        java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException
        java.io.IOException

      • writePostDataToStream

        public static void writePostDataToStream(java.io.OutputStream outputStream,
                                         java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> params,
                                         java.nio.charset.Charset charset)
                                  throws java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException,
                                         java.io.IOException
        Write parameters in the output stream of the 'POST' request.
        Parameters:
        outputStream - The stream to write in.
        params - The parameters to write.
        charset - The encoded format of the string built.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if outputStream or params or charset is null.
        java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException
        java.io.IOException

      • writePostDataToStream

        public static void writePostDataToStream(java.io.OutputStream outputStream,
                                         java.lang.String urlEncodedparams)
                                  throws java.io.IOException
        Write parameters in the output stream of the 'POST' request.
        Parameters:
        outputStream - The stream to write in.
        urlEncodedparams - The URL encoded string with the parameters to send.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if outputStream or params or charset is null.
        java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException
        java.io.IOException

                                         java.io.IOException

        urlEncodedparams - The URL encoded string with the parameters to send.
        charset -
        Throws:

      • checkHostAvailable

        public static void checkHostAvailable(java.lang.String hostName,
                                      int timeOut)
                               throws java.net.UnknownHostException
        Try to resolve the host in order to check if can be reached.
        Parameters:
        hostName - host to connect is DNS format such as "myhost.home.com".
        timeOut - max time in seconds waiting host response. If 0 then 10 sec is default value.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if httpUrl is null.
        java.net.UnknownHostException

        Parameters:
        headers -
        Returns:
